testcase.name: Create a walk-in booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to bookings page............................................passed And I create a walk-in booking for NSDB room type...........................passed Then the booking should be created successfully.............................passed

testcase.name: Create a reservation booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed When I navigate to bookings page............................................passed And I create a reservation booking for NSDB room type.......................passed Then the reservation booking should be created successfully.................passed
